summary.level_blocker: Level 4 prerequisites are present; Level 5 needs broader external validation, uncertainty estimates and more species-unit mappings.

required_for_level_4: At least one ready_for_fit target for trail dynamics or foraging recruitment.
At least one independent validation curve not used for parameter fitting.
Species-specific unit mapping for time, distance and core physiological variables.

rows.biological_process: Independent no-jam traffic validation: density versus mean velocity on a natural ant trail.
rows.current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 exports no-jam speed and flow metrics; validate_traffic_holdout.py compares normalized speed retention without fitting.
rows.next_action: Use as independent holdout while fitting traffic/contact parameters to a separate curve.
rows.required_data: density bin; mean velocity; velocity variance or distribution width; species and trail geometry

rows.biological_process: Individual turning response as a function of local pheromone difference and total pheromone.
rows.current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 exports per-step sensing and turning logs but previously lacked a numeric target curve.
rows.next_action: Use the Perna 2012 response curve to calibrate shared Weber-style turn-response parameters, then validate against an independent holdout curve.
rows.required_data: total pheromone around the ant; turning slope or turn angle response; species/arena conditions; source figure/table and fitted parameter confidence interval

rows.biological_process: Pheromone trail decay after food removal or rain/washout.
rows.current_proxy: literature_pheromone_constraints_v1 checks qualitative persistence effects only.
rows.next_action: Digitize trail decay or trail occupancy time series and map model day to the paper's time axis.
rows.required_data: time since food removal or washout; trail pheromone proxy or trail occupancy; species/arena conditions; replicate variance or confidence interval

rows.biological_process: Food quality or concentration versus recruitment/trail-laying strength.
rows.current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 checks high-quality source bias qualitatively.
rows.next_action: Digitize food-quality recruitment curves and add a concentration-to-quality mapping.
rows.required_data: food concentration or quality; trail-laying event rate or recruitment count; time window; species and colony state

rows.biological_process: Branch choice probability/time course under symmetric and biased trails.
rows.current_proxy: calibrate_double_bridge.py fits a literature model reference, not raw biological counts.
rows.next_action: Replace or supplement the model reference with digitized branch-choice curves from a real double-bridge experiment.
rows.required_data: time or crossing index; branch choice probability; path length / bridge geometry; replicate count

rows.biological_process: Trail density versus speed/flow under crowding.
rows.next_action: Digitize speed-density or flow-density curves and fit contact/crowding parameters.
rows.required_data: linear density; mean speed; flow or flux; trail geometry

rows.biological_process: Frontal encounter pushing/redirect probability under crowded ant traffic.
rows.current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 now exports traffic_redirect_per_encounter from the shared traffic-pressure rule; validate_pushing_redirect.py compares it to the Figure 3d slope.
rows.next_action: Keep as a mechanism holdout while fitting traffic/contact parameters to independent traffic curves.
rows.required_data: frontal encounter count; pushing or redirect count; bridge width / crowding condition; confidence interval

rows.biological_process: Temperature/humidity stress versus brood survival or development.
rows.next_action: Digitize brood survival/development curves or collect lab data for the target species.
rows.required_data: temperature and humidity; brood stage composition; survival or development rate; time horizon

rows.biological_process: Worker survival benefit of free corpse removal versus restricted corpse removal.
rows.current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 now exports free-removal and restricted-removal necrophoresis survival conditions using the shared nest-corpse social-immunity pressure rule.
rows.next_action: Use the endpoint as an independent social-immunity holdout, then fit raw survival time-series from the supplementary data.
rows.required_data: corpse-removal treatment; worker survival endpoint; sample size by treatment; endpoint variance

rows.biological_process: Queen founding reserves, egg laying and first worker emergence over time.
rows.current_proxy: actual_biology_simulation.py has founding_colony viability smoke output only.
rows.next_action: Select a target species and add founding-stage laboratory or literature count curves.
rows.required_data: days since founding; egg/larva/pupa/worker counts; queen survival and reserve state; temperature and feeding regime
